name: WW Apple-Orange Spice Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Instant nonfat dry milk powder
1 tbsp + 1 tsp. Firmly packed Brown sugar
1 tbsp + 1 tsp. Frozen orange juice (no added sugar)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
Sift together flour, baking powder, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, nutmeg, and cloves in a small bowl; stir in milk powder and set aside.
In a mixing bowl, cream margarine with sugar. Add egg yolk and beat until thick and creamy.
Add apples, raisins, juice, orange peel, and stir to combine. Add flour mixture and beat until well blended.
In a separate bowl, beat egg white with cream of tartar until stiff but not dry; fold into batter.
Spray eight 2-1/2 inch diameter nonstick muffin pan cups with nonstick cooking spray. Spoon about 2/3 full of batter into each cup. Partially fill remaining cups with water to prevent the pan from burning or warping.
Bake for 20 to 25 minutes (until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean). Remove the pan from the oven and carefully drain off water. Remove muffins to a wire rack and let cool.
4 servings of 2 MUFFINS EACH!
Each serving provides: 1 B, 2 F, 1 FR, 1/4 M, 40 OPTIONAL CALORIES.
Per serving: 267 calories; 6 g protein; 9 g fat; 40 g carbohydrate; 177 mg calcium; 343 mg sodium; 70 mg cholesterol.
